name: projeto-qualicorp
description: Automacao de extracao de planos Qualicorp para posterior integracao com Koter

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npx playwright install chromium -w backend
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
